name: i2c_scan
description: Scan I2C bus for connected devices and identify common addresses
command: echo '=== I2C Bus {{bus}} Scan ===' && i2cdetect -y {{bus}} 2>/dev/null || echo 'i2cdetect not available. Install: sudo apt install i2c-tools'

bus.description: I2C bus number (usually 1 for Raspberry Pi)
